query: SELECT id, numeroNf, serieNf, chaveNfe, postoId, ROUND(quantidadeOriginal, 3) as qtdOrig, ROUND(quantidadeDisponivel, 3) as qtdDisp, status, statusNfe, origem FROM lotes WHERE id IN (720001, 720002, 720003, 720005, 720006, 720007, 720009, 720010, 720011) ORDER BY id
